description: Detects files with too many #include directives in C++ -- consider forward declarations or splitting. Simplified from Rust: flags every preproc_include node (info severity) without threshold counting, file-size scaling, or system vs project include distinction. Higher false-positive rate -- every include in every file is flagged. NOLINT suppression is not supported in the JSON DSL.

flag.message: #include directive detected -- review if all dependencies are necessary; consider forward declarations to reduce coupling
